title: cross_engine m3 deeper integration plan — m3 anchor system import into hexa_sim atlas vocabulary
trigger: F126-F132 cross-engine integration (commit 368209c0) covers 1 m3 file SHA only (spec/m3_anchor_log_schema.json @ F126); m3 anchor system internals (5 source artifacts + invariants from 4 ω-cycles + closed-loop dossier) remain unanchored. HANDOFF v4 open question #3 — deeper m3 import.

m3_source_artifacts.role: 5-step git tag + signature publication protocol + 6-item trust list
cert schema + verifier protocol + Löb gate + Tarski separation + atomic append
p1 retroactive emit ω-cycle (13 axes — Fischhoff hindsight + confabulation + ts-no-forge)
p3 SHA-256 hash chain ω-cycle (13 axes — canonical JSON + GENESIS sentinel + fork detection)
p5 Tarski-separated verifier ω-cycle (13 axes — Löb gate + meta-verifier regress + Rice undecidability)
external anchor workflow ω-cycle (4 axes — workflow + trust list + rotation + key compromise)

m3_invariants_identified_by_meta_engine: I1 lob_gate_self_trust_keys_blocked — verifier MUST REJECT any cert row with self_consistent / trust_self / verifier_must_accept keys (m3 §5 + p5 a3 + p5 b6, theorem: Löb 1955)

I2 tarski_object_meta_separation — populator emits cert log (object L); separate process verifier emits verification log (meta L_1); no shared memory; verifier never writes cert log; populator never reads verification log mid-round (m3 §6 + p5 b1/b2/b3)
I3 hash_chain_genesis_zero64 — R4 prior_cert_ref = '0'*64 sentinel; downstream rows = sha256(canonical_json(prior_row)); chain break = ABORT, no overwrite (p3 q3/q4/q5, theorem: NIST FIPS 180-4)

I4 retroactive_disclaimer_mandatory — retroactive cert rows MUST carry retroactive_disclaimer.{evidence_rank,confabulation_risk,falsifier_evaluation:'disabled'}; absence = REJECT (p1 q3, theorems: Fischhoff 1975 + Gazzaniga 1985)
I5 expected_outcome_historical_sentinel — retroactive decisions[].expected_outcome = 'historical' sentinel; populator may NOT backwrite outcome (p1 q2, theorem: Fischhoff 1975 hindsight bias)
I6 ts_no_forge_evolution_log_mirror — retroactive cert ts EXACT mirror of evolution_log row ts; emitted_at_ts lives only in disclaimer; ts < emitted_at_ts mandatory invariant (p1 q6)
I7 row_size_4kib_posix_atomicity — each cert row < 4096 bytes (POSIX PIPE_BUF); rows ≥ 4 KiB use staging file + rename(2) atomic swap (m3 §7 + p3 q7)

I8 external_anchor_munchhausen_terminator — Tarski hierarchy non-terminating; truncation by DECREE at V_1 anchored to external out-of-band root (git tag + signature + GitHub remote receipt); NOT a formal termination (p5 a6/b1, theorem: Münchhausen trilemma — Albert 1968)
I9 anchor_rotation_disjunctive_10rounds_or_24h — anchor every 10 cert rounds OR every 24 hours, whichever first (anchor_workflow x3, F5 falsifier)
I10 audit_append_only_no_history_rewrite — cert log + anchor log + fork report + break report all append-only; key-rotation events recorded via notes pointer; NEVER delete/modify (raw 77 + p3 q5)
I11 cert_phase_state_machine — cert lifecycle = (emit) → (chain_link) → (verify) → (anchor); phase reachability requires populator + chain + verifier + anchor all present (m3 dossier §3 + §6 + p5 a4)

candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_A_schema_field_S_entries: m3 cert/anchor schema fields → @S structure entries (e.g., @S m3_cert_required_fields = ts/round/ordinal_label/axes_acted/decisions/assumptions/prior_cert_ref/rollback_marker/self_hash). Verdict: REJECTED — duplicates JSON schema; F126 already SHA-anchors the schema; field-level @S entries add atlas noise without verifier leverage.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_B_invariant_M_meta_entries: m3 phase invariants → @M meta-axis entries analog to F132. Each invariant becomes one @M entry in NEW shard atlas.append.m3-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 with grep-based falsifier (cmd-level: grep -qE on @M slug in shard). Captures load-bearing INVARIANTS not file content. Verdict: SELECTED for I1 (Löb gate) + extends F132 meta-axis pattern.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_C_phase_T_trace_entries: m3 phases → @T trace entries (verify each phase artifact exists by SHA). @T m3_p1_retroactive_emit_spec_v0 / @T m3_p3_hash_chain_spec_v0 / @T m3_p5_tarski_verifier_spec_v0 / @T m3_external_anchor_workflow_v0 / @T m3_anchor_falsifier_spec_v0 / @T m3_closed_loop_dossier_v0. Each SHA-stable, idempotent, verifies phase reachability. Verdict: SELECTED — covers 6 m3 source files not in F126.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.chosen: B + C combination — 1 @M meta-axis entry (I1 Löb gate, the load-bearing invariant) + 6 @T file-SHA entries (covering remaining m3 source corpus). Total 7 atlas entries (matches F126-F132 cadence). Other I-invariants (I2..I11) deferred to Tier-2 — they require dedicated test scaffolding (meta_decision_cert.jsonl + verifier impl) not yet on disk; SHA-only anchoring would be premature.

When approved: (1) write n6/atlas.append.m3-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 with 7 entries (6 @T + 1 @M), (2) append F154-F160 to design/hexa_sim/falsifiers.jsonl, (3) refresh state/falsifier_registry.sha256, (4) re-run atlas_index / hot-shard / deg, (5) collision-check via grep against existing shards (m3_anchor_log_schema_v0 already in F126/cross-engine shard — 6 new @T slugs + 1 @M slug all disjoint), (6) run F154-F160: 6/7 PASS expected (F160 shard-creation gated), (7) single atomic commit

fixpoint.next_omega_cycle_trigger: user merge approved → re-run cross-engine integration audit to confirm 7 new falsifiers PASS (105+7=112 → 119 PASS) and zero collision; THEN apply same B+C pattern to m5 ordinal / r4 replan / r10 coupling systems (m5 has 8 ω-cycles + bnf + dossier; r4 has 5dag + i1-i5 ω-cycles + dossier; r10 has m10 coupling dossier — analogous SHA + meta-axis structure)

cross_engine_pattern_extensibility.applicable_to_m5_ordinal: YES — m5 has 8 ω-cycles (ordinal_infra/i1i2_parser/i4_schema/i5_fixpoint/i6_23round/bnf_augment/spec_corpus/i1i2_emission) + dossier + bnf spec; analogous SHA @T entries for each ω-cycle + 1-2 @M meta-axes (e.g., @M m5_ordinal_descent_strict_or_axes_acted_nonempty, @M m5_bnf_4_separation_classes); F127+F130 already cover tool + bnf SHA — deeper covers ω-cycle witnesses
cross_engine_pattern_extensibility.applicable_to_r4_replan: YES — r4 has 5dag + i1-i5 ω-cycles + dossier + r4_bench MANIFEST; F128+F129 cover tool + manifest SHA — deeper covers 6 ω-cycle witnesses + 1 @M (e.g., @M r4_replan_geo_mean_drop_threshold_below_1)
cross_engine_pattern_extensibility.applicable_to_r10_coupling: YES — r10 has m10 coupling dossier + likely ω-cycle witnesses; F131 covers dossier SHA — deeper would expand to ω-cycle SHAs once r10 ω-cycle inventory complete
cross_engine_pattern_extensibility.shared_pattern: B+C combination per cross-engine system: N @T (file-SHA per ω-cycle/dossier/spec) + 1-2 @M (load-bearing invariant); shard naming convention atlas.append.<axis>-deeper-2026-04-26.n6
